title: Compensation of substitute marshal
doc_html:
§1822.  Compensation of substitute marshal

Whenever any person is appointed by the mayor as provided for in R.S. 33:1821, he may demand the same fees and compensation that are allowed to the marshal of the incorporated village.
doc_text:
§1822.  Compensation of substitute marshal
Whenever any person is appointed by the mayor as provided for in R.S. 33:1821, he may demand the same fees and compensation that are allowed to the marshal of the incorporated village.
